Key US Yield at 5% Highlights Mounting Pressure in Bond Market - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: The yield on 30-year US government debt hovered around 5% after breaching the key level for the first time this year — suggesting pressure in the world’s biggest bond market isn’t letting up.
